Chestplate of Fiery Might  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: CHEST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 60
STR: +7 DEX: +7 STA: +7 CHA: +7 WIS: +7 INT: +7 AGI: +7 HP: +30 MANA: +30 ENDUR: +30
SV FIRE: +7 SV DISEASE: +7 SV COLD: +7 SV MAGIC: +7 SV POISON: +7
Effect: Fiery Might (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 50.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR PAL SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Usable at lvl 3
QuoteReply
# May 11 2023 at 12:21 AM Rating: Decent
Verti0Lanys
6 posts
99.9 (repeating of course) % sure it is castable at lvl 1, I have this on a lvl 4 warr twink and she can click it. 5 hp Regen and 5 hp DS, unique spell, it stacks with other regen and DS, I have Cloak of Icy Shadows from VT and Cloak of Thorns ToV, I believe, it stack with 1 of those, but cloak DS overwrite each other, but both stack w/ BP buff, nice to have a lvl 1 War w/ Fungi and 6 different clickable items for self buffs, she has 1700 hp self buffed at lvl 7. Fun,

BP
QuoteReply
# Jan 02 2003 at 1:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779246827
5 posts
I got this at 60. Hate the color :)
I like the massive AC on it because it allows me to not worry so much about that stat on all my other slots. So I get a great deal more options on where to add HP.. Because yes if you ever MT HP has become just about the most important thing.
And although some BP's have greater HP. 5 hp a tick adds alot of HP in its own round about way

4 posts
If you don't play the high end game, please don't try to comment on something you know nothing about. Being in an uber guild on a raid takes coordination. If ONE person on the raid does not know his job, the whole raid can be wiped out. Please if you are only projecting on what you think is the high end game, keep you comments to yourself.

Team
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2002 at 10:11 AM Rating: Default

Zolmaz
QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2002 at 1:18 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591773305563
16 posts
...well, just want to get something cleared...

from what you say it sounds like YOU have earned this BP...that is totaly BS from my point of view...as long as you cant get something for yourself YOU havent earned ****...at least not as a warrior on a lvl 66 mob...place yourself close to the mob and press attack key...go to bed and take a nap...wake up when they make up there mind whos going to get what from the loot...

a cleric can earn something best of the classes since they have the healing ability...if a groups cleric go 00m and they are close to get wiped and one cleric notice that and steps forward to heal there melee so the 00m cleric can med up some...thats earning something...not stand infront and hit hit hit hit hit hit hit...even as a paladin thats said to be the worse class in the game (what i play) i think you can earn stuff better than a warrior

what will you do when you take massive damage in the beginning of a fight and the cleric have to heal you and get agro...you know that you have to get agro back in a few secs or the cleric is dead...leads to your death to. what will you do...the thing you have done for your entire norrath life...keep hitting and hoping that it will be enough...

worse class, paladin...on a mob like this it takes planning...get your LoH back in that time...keep casting spells on the mob in the entire fight...build agro...doesnt matter if you accidently take the agro from the MT since you can take the damage...cleric gets agro...what will you do...use LoH...super fast heal with massive agro...

well, think i got to the point where i said what i was supposed to...warriors doenst earn ****...they stand there and take damage with a uber char saving them all the time...(the clerics, had to say it so no one thinks i mean paladins)

sorry about my spelling, english is 3rd language

LET THE FLAMING BEGIN!!! (cmon warriors, i know your pissed now)
▲ Page top
RE: Zolmaz
QuoteReply
# May 12 2002 at 10:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764944610
110 posts
You sure are one Stupid $%#%, thats all i had to say.
▲ Page top
RE: Zolmaz
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2002 at 2:30 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592757218364
Scholar
34 posts
SeanChai you obviously have no idea how the high end game is played. This item is awarded to an individual based on many things. No single person can "earn" this item, rather the whole raid force "earns" the oportunity to award this to someone within the force who may have through many raids earned the right to wear such an item.

For you to say that warriors are incapable of earning anything only shows how little you know. Tell me how many successful ToV raids you've seen without a good MT? None. Any monkey with a weapon can stand in front of a mob and beat on it. It takes a bit more to manage agro, keep the mob positioned properly, etc, etc. If you don't know what I'm talking about...you never will. The same can be said for other Melee, if you're not the MT your job is to inflict as much damage as possible withOUT gaining agro.

All classes are needed, an Army of Warriors could not walk up to any of the named ToV dragons and survive the encounter with out the help of a bunch of Clerics to keep them alive. The same can be said for Clerics, or Paladins, Rogues, Rangers, etc. It takes a well balanced raid force of people with their act together to make the high end mobs dead. Personally...I wouldn't trade the Paly's in my guild for anything because they know their game and we are better for having them with us.

If I'm not Main Tank, Secondary Tank, Third Tank..whatever, it's my job not to get agro. I do my job very well, if I'm getting hit my cleric may have to heal me rather than a MT or ST. The most recent run through the Ssra Temple doing the second Rahg I did NOT get hit a single time through the entire fight. If I am MT or ST etc, it's my job to keep the mobs attention on me...ME alone, the reason for this is so clerics can consentrate on healing...ONE PERSON. It's called efficiency. If all your clerics are trying to heal everyone but the MT...MT dies, clerics die, Paladins...DIE. Everybody dies. It's pretty simple. You work as a team, one unit, efficiently, everyone working together, doing their part to make it successful. If that means keeping the mob on you, or keeping the MT alive, or keeping the cleric who's keeping the MT alive, debuffing the mob (poor shammys, they die a lot getting slow in, I love you guys) Chanters doing the Tashicide boogy, without everyone doing their thing...the raid will fail.

I have this BP, and yes...I did earn the right to wear it by spending more time than I can freekin remember in ToV, countless raids, countless critters, doing my part, helping make each kill successful. Did I do something at the particular kill where I got the BP that I could say I "earned" it? Probably not, I was there, doing my job, along with another 50 of my friends who equally deserve the right to wear this thing. I'm just greatful that they feel my contributions have been such that they chose me to award this to.
▲ Page top
RE: Zolmaz
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2002 at 3:23 PM Rating: Decent
pewterskier
82 posts
Excellent message, well presented.
____________________________
Cirulik
Dread Lord of Greenmist
▲ Page top
TEAM
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2002 at 10:13 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591770561065
119 posts
Honestly, every class has it's place.
I can't say that any has any massive advantage over others. The key is that, when played together properly a GROUP earns something. There is nothing worse than a group member who thinks they are the prima donna.

Sure, the cleric does the healing/buffing, the Warriors does the taunting/tanking but both are working towards the same goal. That's what they are good at. The rogues and monks deal out heavy damage, as do mages and wizards. The bards, necros and enchanters keep your mana up, and can even stack up some extra buffs. Paladins, Rangers and everyone else does their part.

Yes, stepping back to help the cleric is a good idea. It's your job as the backup healer. Just as it is the job of the backup tank to pull the mob off of dying warrior or unlucky caster.

My point is that no one wins if you can't be a team player. Especially as a paladin, you should be promoting sportsmanship.
▲ Page top
RE: TEAM
QuoteReply
# May 15 2002 at 6:15 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591775266424
11 posts
Amen also
Who's place is it to say one class is better than the rest? Who is to say one is worse the the rest?
Every class has a place, no matter wear he is.

# Dec 18 2001 at 8:41 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591773186638
3 posts
Dacaar,
what you say has some truth, true. But,
Not anyone can own this. To own a BP like this takes Skills beyond belief. Skill's and Additude
that only is seen in very rare instances.

Guilds that earn things like these do not party
and revel in the loot, I know. They know the work
they did was worth armor the likes of the CoFM.
And all the guild gets makes them that much Stronger for the next Battle...

It's not just earned. Its Worked for.
TONS of work. Laboring hard and Loving every Min of It..
Every Loving Min of it. This Bp is Cream of the crop.

A Warriors Dream. I know. Because I have one. And
Every day I use it for all it's Worth to play my
game as hard and as fast as I can Possibly play.

Raravis" Has the stats on the Click proc right.

It takes much more then just a gathering to take
this Bp home. It takes EARNING the right to have it.
Trust me. If your not in your game. And All you
care about is Stuff, You will only dream about
having such a Bp..


Edited, Tue Dec 18 08:43:33 2001

34 posts

way to much arguing about ticks, its every 6 seconds, watch your HP, it goes, tick, 1, 2 , 3 , 4 , 5, 6 seconds tick, 1 , 2 , 3 , 4 , 5 , 6 seconds tick,, that is what a tick is, this bp ownz, it should look much nicer though really doesn't look amazing, should have like fire comin off it or somthing cool,

# Aug 22 2001 at 9:12 PM Rating: Default

lol...go back to grade school boy

1 tick = 6 seconds
60 seconds (1 min)=10 ticks

do the math
▲ Page top
RE: Firey Might
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2001 at 7:50 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965902610
View User Forum
Scholar
29 posts
10 ticks = 1 second
600 ticks = 60 seconds

Its written in the eqmanual_supplement.txt. Look under the "how to pause section"
▲ Page top
RE: Firey Might
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2001 at 9:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249606794
75 posts
Skyros, that is incorrect. 600 ticks is 60 minutes.

and thats coming straight from SpDat.eff

__DEL__1591771752638
21 posts
NO Raravis I am sorry you are wrong =( 600 secs is 10 minutes. To figure this out just figure 60 seconds is 1 min then divide 60 from 600 and you get 10. so it is a 10 min regen. It wouldnt make sense to have 3000hp regen over 60minuets (although i wouldnt be suprised if Verant threw something like that in) and 60 second 3000 hp would be to damn good.


Tinomin
Lanys'Tyvl

*We Can Dance if We Want To !!!!*
▲ Page top
RE: Firey Might
QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2001 at 6:33 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591771608578
Scholar
16 posts
Sorry Tin, Raravis was correct. One "tick" is six seconds. You can look at the spdat and see for yourself if you don't believe me. So 1 tick = six seconds => 10 ticks = 1 minute => 600 ticks = 60 minutes. So that's 3000 hp's in 60 minutes or 5 hp's per tick. Now you say that wouldn't make sense, but I say that's five more hp's per tick than you were getting before so be glad to have 'em. That regen is almost a third of the Fungi Tunic (or it may be exactly a third. Can't remember if Fungi is 15 or 18 hp's per tick), but with this you also get the amazing AC and the awesome stats. And if the effect stacks with regen spells then your warrior just became an uber tank. That's the way I see it any way.

Hmm why in the hell we have 20 peeps posting about ticks?jus wanna know bout the BP....thats all .saw lv 60 pally named Madbub with this in Velks and people were congradulating him and i was like hmm i should check this out and all yall talkin bout is ticks.saw gauntlets of firey might for as low as 6k and i was like man the market is crashing or something.this is the bp of my dreams and blows DW BP out of the water.one day i hope to have this.

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 23 2001 at 10:01 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) what is the best armor for a warr bar and what type of stuff shuld i give to my druid for wis
RE: LOOK
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2001 at 2:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570526995
103 posts
Ok the best way to find out. On this site there is a section called equipment. Go to the search section and if memory severs the default is barbarian and click search.. you will get a list of every item that a Barb can use or you can pick a specific slot that you want to look up..like 1 or 2 handed weapons, shields, or armor pieces. It is a time saver as when the new screen pops up it will tell you the name of the item, stats, where it drops, and what lvls the person needs to obtain it..and when you find what your seeking click on the item for more info. :) Hope this helps a bit.

Aamadanae Whirlwind
45th Paladin of The Knights of Burning Justice

Every single post that I've seen about high level armor always has someone calling people names and ridiculing them for concerning themselves with the item. The reasoning is that its too high level and people shouldn't concern themselves with it or that this class or that doesn't deserve the item.

For those people, only one word comes to mind...a$$hole. If WE want to peruse these boards and learn how to get better equipment, it is of no consequense or even any business of yours. Do us all a favor and go troll some other boards.

# Jun 11 2001 at 9:08 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
It drops from Lord Feshlak, in the north wing of ToV. Feshlak is one of the dragons you can engage after killing Aaryonar who blocks the way into the upper parts of the north wing. Truthfully, any information I give wouldn't really help you until you beat Aary first, and before that, figuring out how to clear to aary.
